scripts.lint: corepack pnpm exec biome lint apps convex tests docs/setup README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json biome.json playwright.config.ts vitest.workspace.ts .env.example .gitignore
scripts.format:check: corepack pnpm exec biome check --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false apps convex tests docs/setup README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json biome.json playwright.config.ts vitest.workspace.ts .env.example .gitignore
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm --filter @liminal-build/platform typecheck
scripts.red-verify: corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build
scripts.test:convex: corepack pnpm exec vitest run convex --environment node
scripts.test:service: corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/service/server --environment node
scripts.test:client: corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/service/client --environment jsdom
scripts.test:integration: corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/integration --environment node
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "console.log('SKIP: test:e2e scaffolded in Story 0; no executable suite yet')"
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm run red-verify && corepack pnpm run test:convex && corepack pnpm run test:service && corepack pnpm run test:client
scripts.guard:no-test-changes: node -e "console.log('SKIP: guard:no-test-changes not implemented for this repo yet')"
scripts.green-verify: corepack pnpm run verify && corepack pnpm run guard:no-test-changes
scripts.verify-all: corepack pnpm run verify && corepack pnpm run test:integration && corepack pnpm run test:e2e
